epic.title: APIM Thread Governance Surface
epic.description: Governed ingress and routing for dependency-aware control-plane orchestration. Extends APIM policy, product, and header contracts so thread identity, correlation, and policy decisions remain stable across 33-eva-brain-v2, 38-ado-poc, 40-eva-control-plane, and 14-az-finops.

features.title: Thread-Aware Header and Policy Contract
features.description: Add APIM policy support for x-eva-thread-id, x-eva-lane-id, x-eva-correlation-id, and gate decision headers so threaded execution remains governed and observable.

features.title: Thread Projection and Command Routes
features.description: Expose APIM-managed routes for thread dashboards, ready queues, critical path views, and governed command surfaces backed by brain-v2 and control-plane APIs.

user_stories.title: [APIM-THREAD-WI-1] APIM policy injects and normalizes thread identity headers
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: APIM enforces x-eva-thread-id, x-eva-lane-id, x-eva-correlation-id, and decision metadata headers. Downstream services receive stable thread context regardless of caller origin.

evidence.notes: Required for consistent cross-plane thread observability and governance.

user_stories.title: [APIM-THREAD-WI-2] APIM publishes governed thread projection routes
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Thread projection routes are exposed through APIM for dashboards and operator tools. Routing preserves auth, rate limiting, and decision-gate policies while shielding internal service topology.

evidence.notes: Connects thread APIs to operator-facing surfaces without bypassing APIM governance.
